Core Elements of Antibiotic Stewardship 
Sept. 10, 2025 
At a glance 
Antibiotic stewardship is the effort to measure and improve how antibiotics are prescribed by clinicians and used by patients. 
CDC's Core Elements of Antibiotic Stewardship offer providers and facilities a set of key principles to guide efforts to i
